fixSummary: Preserves LaTeX commands beginning with \t during literal newline/tab decoding, so \text{...}, \times, \top, and \theta are not converted into visible ext/imes/op/heta fragments.
Patches both preview renderer and export/normalizeSlide copies, including classic and ESM files.
Adds defensive selected-block replacement sanitization for Mathpix/MinerU/AI block replacements.
Runs local math repair on Mathpix patch decks before frontend return/merge and sanitizes merged Mathpix blocks.
Backend Mathpix normalization now also closes command-spacing gaps such as \text { ... } -> \text{... }.
